ENC.description: Encryption Header containing all parameters needed for decryption

EPHEMERAL_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Ephemeral public key for ECDH key agreement (32-65 bytes depending on algorithm)

NONCE_START.description: Random 12-byte nonce starting value. Incremented for each record in the stream to ensure unique nonces.

RECIPIENT_KEY_ID.description: Optional identifier for the recipient's public key (up to 32 bytes)

SCHEMA_HASH.description: Optional SHA-256 hash of the FlatBuffers schema (32 bytes)

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name from the schema

TIMESTAMP.description: Optional Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when encryption was performed

payloadWireFormat.description: Logical payload wire format for a stream frame or an accepted port type.

FLATBUFFER.description: Body is a FlatBuffer with the root + file identifier stated in FLATBUFFER_TYPE_REF.

ALIGNED_BINARY.description: Body is a raw aligned binary chunk (for example zero-copy structs).

bufferMutability.description: Buffer mutability contract advertised by a stream port.

SINGLE_WRITER_MUTABLE.description: Buffer may be written in place by the owner (single writer).

bufferOwnership.description: Buffer ownership contract advertised by a stream port.

HOST_OWNED.description: Arena / host owns the backing bytes; receiver must not free.

PLUGIN_OWNED.description: Plugin owns the backing bytes; host must not free.

TRANSFERRED.description: Ownership transfers with the frame (hand-off semantics).

Shader.description: GLSL shader plugins for custom visualization

purchaseTier.description: Storefront payment model for the plugin listing

publicationState.description: Publication visibility for the plugin listing

Unlisted.description: Addressable directly but hidden from public browse surfaces

Retired.description: No longer offered for new installs or purchases

COMMAND.description: Command surface — envelope is queued by a runtime host.

SINGLE_SHOT.description: One invocation consumes exactly one input frame.

DRAIN_UNTIL_YIELD.description: Invocation drains queued work until it voluntarily yields.

DRAIN_TO_EMPTY.description: Invocation drains to empty before returning.

hostCapabilityKind.description: enum-based surface that runtime hosts gate on.

SCHEMA_VERSION.description: Optional semver or schema revision string.

ROOT_TYPE.description: Optional root type name within the schema.

SCHEMA_HASH.description: Optional schema hash bytes for stronger compatibility checks.

ACCEPTS_ANY_FLATBUFFER.description: True when this port/type set accepts any FlatBuffer frame.

WIRE_FORMAT.description: Logical wire format for this accepted type.

FLATBUFFER.description: Body is a FlatBuffer with the root + file identifier stated in FLATBUFFER_TYPE_REF.

ALIGNED_BINARY.description: Body is a raw aligned binary chunk (for example zero-copy structs).

FIXED_STRING_LENGTH.description: Fixed string length for aligned-binary string fields, when applicable.

BYTE_LENGTH.description: Byte length for fixed-size aligned-binary records, when applicable.

REQUIRED_ALIGNMENT.description: Required start alignment for aligned-binary records, when applicable.

FlatBufferTypeRef.description: Payload-schema identity for a stream frame or an accepted port type.

OFFSET.description: Byte offset of the payload body within the arena.

SIZE.description: Byte length of the payload body.

ALIGNMENT.description: Required start alignment of the payload body (in bytes).

FLATBUFFER.description: Body is a FlatBuffer with the root + file identifier stated in FLATBUFFER_TYPE_REF.

ALIGNED_BINARY.description: Body is a raw aligned binary chunk (for example zero-copy structs).

SINGLE_WRITER_MUTABLE.description: Buffer may be written in place by the owner (single writer).

HOST_OWNED.description: Arena / host owns the backing bytes; receiver must not free.

PLUGIN_OWNED.description: Plugin owns the backing bytes; host must not free.

TRANSFERRED.description: Ownership transfers with the frame (hand-off semantics).

FRAME_ID.description: Optional opaque frame identifier for stream bookkeeping.

TAB.description: Typed Arena Buffer — one descriptor for a payload slot in a shared arena.

SET_ID.description: Stable type-set identifier within the port.

ALLOWED_TYPES.description: Specific FlatBuffer types accepted by the set.

ALLOWED_WIRE_FORMATS.description: FLATBUFFER MUST also be present for the same schemas.

DESCRIPTION.description: Human-readable explanation of the accepted schema family.

PLGAcceptedTypeSet.description: Accepted schema family for a port. When a port accepts multiple wire formats (canonical FlatBuffer + aligned-binary), each ALLOWED_TYPE entry carries its own TAB.FlatBufferTypeRef with the schema identity, and the enclosing PLGPortManifest advertises both wire formats via ALLOWED_WIRE_FORMATS. Per SDK contract: a port that advertises aligned-binary MUST also advertise the canonical flatbuffer fallback for the same schema and file identifier in the same set.

PORT_ID.description: Stable port identifier within the method.

ACCEPTED_TYPE_SETS.description: Type sets accepted on this port.

MIN_STREAMS.description: Minimum number of streams that must be connected.

MAX_STREAMS.description: Maximum number of streams that may be connected.

REQUIRED.description: Whether the port must be connected for invocation.

PLGPortManifest.description: One input or output port on a method.

PLGHostCapability.description: One host capability dependency (richer form of PluginCapability).

PLGTimerSpec.description: Timer entry declared by a plugin.

PLGProtocolSpec.description: Protocol handler declared by a plugin.

PLGBuildArtifact.description: Build artifact emitted by the plugin toolchain.

SINGLE_SHOT.description: One invocation consumes exactly one input frame.

DRAIN_UNTIL_YIELD.description: Invocation drains queued work until it voluntarily yields.

DRAIN_TO_EMPTY.description: Invocation drains to empty before returning.

NAME.description: Function name as exported from WASM

TAGLINE.description: Short marketing summary shown in storefront listings

Shader.description: GLSL shader plugins for custom visualization

SUPPORT_URL.description: Support or helpdesk URL for this plugin

TAGS.description: Search and categorization tags for discovery

FEATURES.description: Short feature bullets highlighted in storefront listings

SCREENSHOT_URLS.description: Screenshot URLs showing the plugin in use

BANNER_URL.description: Optional hero/banner image URL for the listing

WASM_HASH.description: SHA256 hash of the decrypted WASM binary

WASM_SIZE.description: Size of decrypted WASM binary in bytes

WASM_CID.description: IPFS CID of the encrypted WASM binary

ENCRYPTED_WASM_HASH.description: SHA256 hash of the encrypted delivery artifact bytes

ENCRYPTED_WASM_SIZE.description: Size of the encrypted delivery artifact in bytes

ENTRY_FUNCTIONS.description: Entry point functions exported by the plugin

REQUIRED_SCHEMAS.description: FlatBuffer schemas required by this plugin

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: Peer ID of the plugin provider

PROVIDER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of provider's EPM (Entity Profile Message)

ENCRYPTED.description: Whether the WASM binary is encrypted

REQUIRED_SCOPE.description: Canonical required scope for grant issuance

KEY_ID.description: Provider-local identifier for the module content key

ALLOWED_DOMAINS.description: Allowed requester domains for module grants

MAX_GRANT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum grant timeout allowed for this module publication

CREATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when plugin was created

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix timestamp when plugin was last updated

CHANGELOG_URL.description: URL to plugin changelog or release notes

PAYMENT_MODEL.description: Commercial model used for storefront purchase flows

PRICE_USD_CENTS.description: Price in USD cents for one-time purchase or subscription period

SUBSCRIPTION_PERIOD_DAYS.description: Subscription billing period length in days

LISTING_STATUS.description: Storefront publication state for this manifest version

Unlisted.description: Addressable directly but hidden from public browse surfaces

Retired.description: No longer offered for new installs or purchases

SIGNATURE.description: Ed25519 signature from provider over manifest

INVOKE_SURFACES.description: MAY list both DIRECT and COMMAND when it supports both.

SCHEMAS_USED.description: FlatBuffer schemas this plugin depends on at the invoke surface.

BUILD_ARTIFACTS.description: Build artifacts emitted by the toolchain (WASM, bindings, etc.).

PLG.description: Plugin Manifest - canonical signed storefront and WASM distribution record

REQUESTER_XPUB.description: Requester account identity or wallet xpub

EXPIRES_AT.description: Grant expiration time in milliseconds since epoch

WRAPPED_CONTENT_KEY_HEADER.description: Encryption header for the recipient-specific wrapped content-key payload.

WRAPPED_CONTENT_KEY_PAYLOAD.description: using `WRAPPED_CONTENT_KEY_HEADER` before reading the key bytes.

GRANT_VERIFIER_PUBKEY.description: Provider public key used to verify the grant signature
